leadText: Gunk Shot (Japanese: ダストシュート Dust Shoot) is a damage-dealing Poison-type move introduced in Generation IV. It is: TR73 in Pokémon Sword and Shield. TM102 in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet. TM100 in Pokémon Legends: Z-A.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 Generations IV and V 1.2 Generation VI onwards 1.3 Generation IX 1.3.1 Pokémon Legends: Z-A Effect [ edit | edit source ] Generations IV and V [ edit | edit source ] Gunk Shot deals damage and has a 30% chance of poisoning the target. Generation VI onwards [ edit | edit source ] Gunk Shot's accuracy was changed from 70% to 80%. Generation IX [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A [ edit | edit source ] Pokémon Legends: Z-A Category Physical Accuracy 100% Standard Plus Move Power 120 144 Cooldown 10s Move wind-up time 30 frames Effect duration —s Additional effect Chance 30% — — May poison the target.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description D P Pt HG SS PBR The user shoots filthy garbage at the foe to attack. It may also poison the target. B W B2 W2 The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. It may also poison the target. X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA S V The user shoots filthy garbage at the target to attack. This may also poison the target. ZA The user attacks by shooting out filthy garbage. This may also leave targets poisoned.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD T D MD S * Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It may also afflict the targeted enemy with a Poisoned status condition, which causes periodic damage. MD S * Inflicts damage on the target, even at a distance. It may also afflict the target with a Poisoned status condition, which causes periodic damage. B S L はなれたポケモンに ダメージをあたえる しかも いっていのかくりつで どくじょうたいにして いっていターンごとに ダメージをあたえる MD GtI It damages even a faraway Pokémon. It could also cause the Poisoned status condition. With the Poisoned status, the Pokémon keeps taking damage and can't restore its HP naturally. S MD It damages a Pokémon, even one far away, and could also make the enemy poisoned.

sections.title: Trivia
sections.text: Trivia [ edit | edit source ] Gunk Shot is tied with Belch for having the highest base power of all Poison-type moves, excluding Venoshock used on a poisoned target and Z-Moves . An Acid Downpour based on either of them has the highest base power of all Poison-type moves.
